commands.review_summary:
The PR adds guarded shape-reading around read-only channel command default resolution and a regression test for poisoned metadata rows before a healthy plugin record.

PR surface: Source +66, Tests +70. Total +136 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main directly reads metadata row properties in the resolver, so a throwing accessor aborts default resolution before later rows. I did not execute tests because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
